---
title: "convert_contrast_ph report"
output: pdf_document
params:
  result: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      comment = "")
```

```{r fig.width=5, fig.height=6}
res <- params$result

if (!is.null(res$plot)) {
  grDevices::replayPlot(res$plot)
}

nm_all  <- names(res)
nm_keep <- setdiff(nm_all, "plot")

for (nm in nm_keep) {
  cat(nm, " = ", res[[nm]], "\n")
}
```
